programme.title: Live: FA Cup Final Day
programme.desc: We bring you all the build-up to one of the biggest fixtures in the football calendar, as Manchester City and Chelsea prepare to collide in the Emirates FA Cup final at Wembley.

programme.title: Live FA Cup Final: Chelsea v Manchester City
programme.desc: Action from the final of the 2026 Emirates FA Cup final between Pep Guardiola's Manchester City and eight-time winners Chelsea at Wembley Stadium.

programme.title: FA Cup: The People's Story
programme.desc: We uncover the untold stories of the FA Cup, revealing how it became a stage where sport and society collide, capturing the spirit of a nation through the beautiful game.

programme.title: MotoGP: Catalunya Sprint Race
programme.desc: Sprint race action from the 2026 MotoGP Grand Prix of Catalunya at the Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya.

programme.title: WorldSBK: Superbike - Race 1
programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Superbike race one at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: UEL & UECL Magazine
programme.desc: We speak to Aston Villa's Unai Emery and John McGinn ahead of the UEFA Europa League final, while Jurgen Klinsmann reflects on what it takes to win this famous old trophy.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: A review of the best action and biggest stories coming out of the seventh event of the LIV Golf season at the Trump National Golf Club in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Fight Week: UFC 328 Review Show
programme.desc: Adam Catterall, Nick Peet and Michael Bisping review UFC 328, where Khamzat Chimaev and Sean Strickland went head-to-head for the middleweight title.

programme.title: Live: UFC Fight Night Prelims
programme.desc: Action from the UFC Fight Night prelims at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas ahead of the featherweight showdown between England's Arnold Allen and Melquizael Costa.

programme.title: Live: UFC Fight Night
programme.desc: Action from UFC Fight Night at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas, featuring the main event clash between featherweights England's Arnold Allen and Melquizael Costa.

programme.title: FA Cup Final: Chelsea v Man City
programme.desc: Action from the final of the 2026 Emirates FA Cup final between Pep Guardiola's Manchester City and eight-time winners Chelsea at Wembley Stadium.

programme.desc: Action from Round 10 as St Kilda, looking to build on their solid start, welcome a struggling Richmond side to Marvel Stadium.

programme.desc: Action from Round 10 as St Kilda, looking to build on their solid start, welcome a struggling Richmond side to Marvel Stadium.

programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.desc: We speak to Aston Villa's Unai Emery and John McGinn ahead of the UEFA Europa League final, while Jurgen Klinsmann reflects on what it takes to win this famous old trophy.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Magazine
programme.desc: We look back at 20 years of UEFA Champions League drama from an Arsenal perspective, plus conversations with Mikel Arteta, Declan Rice, and Martin Odegaard ahead of the final.

programme.title: Premier League Preview
programme.desc: A look ahead to matchday 37 of the Premier League, including Chelsea v Spurs, Bournemouth v Man City, Arsenal v Burnley, and Aston Villa v Liverpool.

programme.desc: Action from the final Derby della Capitale of the season with Roma closing in on a Champions League spot and their rivals looking to throw a spanner in the works.

programme.desc: Darren Fletcher is joined by Martin Keown, Owen Hargreaves, Joe Cole and Ally McCoist to discuss the stars of the 2025/26 Premier League season.

programme.desc: Action from the Gallagher PREM as Leicester Tigers, buoyed by victory over league leaders Northampton Saints, take on a struggling Sale Sharks side at CorpAcq Stadium.

programme.desc: Our No Filter cameras go behind the scenes of the Emirates FA Cup final between Chelsea and Manchester City at Wembley Stadium.

programme.desc: Steven Gerrard sits down with fellow Liverpool legend Mo Salah to reflect on the Egyptian's biggest moments in a Liverpool shirt.

programme.desc: Darren Fletcher is joined by Martin Keown, Owen Hargreaves, Joe Cole and Ally McCoist to discuss the stars of the 2025/26 Premier League season.

programme.desc: A documentary that traces the rise of Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner, revealing how the two young stars are redefining the sport for a new generation.

programme.desc: Action from Stadio Friuli as Cremonese, spearheaded by Jamie Vardy, fight for their Serie A survival against an Udinese side who sit comfortably in mid-table.

programme.desc: We delve into the biggest stories coming out of Vuelta a Espana 2026, as the peloton competed over 21 stages and over 3,275km from Monaco to Granada.

programme.title: Giro d'Italia Men Highlights - S7
programme.desc: Highlights from the first mountain stage of Giro d'Italia 2026, which starts in Formia and sees the riders tackle over 4,500 metres of climbing on a 244km route to Blockhaus.

programme.desc: One of the oldest cities in Italy is the starting point for stage eight of the Giro d'Italia 2026, as the riders journey 156km from Chieti along the Adriatic coast to Fermo.

programme.title: World Superbike Rewind
programme.desc: We relive the best action from round three of the 2026 FIM Superbike World Championship at TT Assen Circuit in the Netherlands.

programme.title: World Superbike Rewind
programme.desc: We rewind to round four of the FIM Superbike World Championship at Balaton Park Circuit in Hungary.

programme.title: Live WorldSBK: Superbike Superpole
programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from the Superbike Superpole at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: Live BSB: Donington Park - Qual
programme.desc: Qualifying heats up at Donington Park as riders push to secure the best possible grid positions for Round 2 of the 2026 British Superbike Championship.

programme.title: Live WorldSBK: Supersport - Race 1
programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Supersport race one at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: Live WorldSBK: Superbike - Race 1
programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Superbike race one at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: Live WorldSBK: Sportbike - Race 1
programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Sportbike at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: Live BSB: Donington Park - Day 1
programme.desc: Day one of round two of the 2026 British Superbike Championship at Donington Park in Leicestershire.

programme.title: Cycling: Vuelta a Espana - Review
programme.desc: We delve into the biggest stories coming out of Vuelta a Espana 2026, as the peloton competed over 21 stages and over 3,275km from Monaco to Granada.

programme.title: Tour of the Basque Country - S2
programme.desc: Women's cycling action from stage two of the 2026 Tour of the Basque Country, which covers a 116km route from Ugao-Miraballes to Igorre.

programme.title: Giro d'Italia Men Highlights - S8
programme.desc: Highlights from stage eight of the Giro d'Italia 2026, as the riders journey 156km from the historic city of Chieti along the Adriatic coast to Fermo.

programme.title: Cycling: Tour of Hungary - Stage 4
programme.desc: Action from the penultimate stage of the 2026 Tour of Hungary. This challenging 188km route from Mohacs to Pecs features 2,080 metres of elevation gain.

programme.title: MotoGP: Catalunya Sprint Race
programme.desc: Sprint race action from the 2026 MotoGP Grand Prix of Catalunya at the Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya.

programme.title: WorldSBK: Superbike - Race 1
programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Superbike race one at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: British Superbikes
programme.desc: Action from race one of the second round of the 2026 British Superbike Championship, taking place at Donington Park in Leicestershire.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: Saracens v Gloucester Rugby
programme.desc: Gallagher PREM action from StoneX Stadium as Saracens look to keep their flickering play-off hopes alive when they host a Gloucester side struggling for consistency.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: A review of the best action and biggest stories coming out of the seventh event of the LIV Golf season at the Trump National Golf Club in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: SailGP Highlights: Bermuda
programme.desc: Highlights from round five of the 2026 Rolex SailGP Championship as 13 elite teams battled it out for glory on the iconic turquoise waters of Bermuda.

programme.title: Fishing: On the Bank
programme.desc: Angling magazine show presented by Rob Hughes and Andy Ford, featuring a look at the winter of 2022.

programme.title: Formula E Flashback - Season 2
programme.desc: We rewind to 2021 and the first-ever ePrix held in Spain. Could driver Antonio Felix da Costa take advantage of his pole position and go on to win his first race of Season 7?

programme.title: Formula E Flashback - Season 2
programme.desc: A look back at the 2021 Monaco ePrix, where round 7 of the ABB FIA Formula E World Championship produced an instant classic in Monte Carlo.

programme.title: FIA Formula E Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from round nine of the 2026 ABB FIA Formula E World Championship at Circuit de Monaco.

programme.title: Bath Rugby v Newcastle Red Bulls
programme.desc: Action from the Gallagher PREM as Bath continue their pursuit of top spot against Newcastle Red Bulls, who are propping up the foot of the table.

programme.title: Harlequins v Exeter Chiefs
programme.desc: Gallagher PREM action from Twickenham Stoop as Exeter Chiefs, who currently sit in fifth and five points clear of fifth-placed Bristol Bears, take on Harlequins.

programme.title: Saracens v Gloucester Rugby
programme.desc: Gallagher PREM action from StoneX Stadium as Saracens look to keep their flickering play-off hopes alive when they host a Gloucester side struggling for consistency.

programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Superbike Superpole race at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: World Superbike Rewind
programme.desc: We revisit the Czech Republic Round of the 2025 Superbike World Championship, as Nicolo Bulega and Toprak Razgatlioglu battled it out in an epic race two.

programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Superbike race one at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Sportbike race two at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Superbike race two at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: No Filter Football
programme.desc: Our No Filter cameras go behind the scenes of the Emirates FA Cup final between Chelsea and Manchester City at Wembley Stadium.

programme.title: Live: Isuzu FA Trophy Final
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Isuzu FA Trophy final at Wembley Stadium as National League sides Southend United and Wealdstone go head-to-head.

programme.title: MotoGP: GP of Catalunya
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 MotoGP Grand Prix of Catalunya at the Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya. Will there be another one-two for Aprilia Racing?

programme.title: WorldSBK: Superbike Superpole Race
programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Superbike Superpole race at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: WorldSBK: Superbike - Race 2
programme.desc: FIM Superbike World Championship action from Superbike race two at Autodrom Most in the Czech Republic.

programme.title: British Superbikes
programme.desc: Action from race two of the second round of the 2026 British Superbike Championship, taking place at Donington Park in Leicestershire.

programme.title: British Superbikes
programme.desc: Action from race three of the second round of the 2026 British Superbike Championship, taking place at Donington Park in Leicestershire.

programme.title: UFC Fight Night - Allen vs Costa
programme.desc: Action from UFC Fight Night at the Meta APEX in Las Vegas, featuring the main event clash between featherweights England's Arnold Allen and Melquizael Costa.

programme.title: AFL: Essendon v Fremantle
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as Essendon take on Fremantle at the MCG. Can the Dockers pick up a ninth win in a row?

programme.title: AFL: St Kilda v Richmond
programme.desc: Action from Round 10 as St Kilda, looking to build on their solid start, welcome a struggling Richmond side to Marvel Stadium.

programme.title: SailGP Highlights: Bermuda
programme.desc: Highlights from round five of the 2026 Rolex SailGP Championship as 13 elite teams battled it out for glory on the iconic turquoise waters of Bermuda.

programme.title: LIV Golf
programme.desc: A review of the best action and biggest stories coming out of the seventh event of the LIV Golf season at the Trump National Golf Club in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: UEL: Real Betis v Nottm Forest
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest return to European football for the first time in 30 years as they travel to face Manuel Pellegrini's Real Betis at Estadio Benito Villamarin.

programme.title: UEL: Rangers v Genk
programme.desc: Russell Martin's Rangers begin their UEFA Europa League campaign as they welcome Belgian side Genk to Ibrox Stadium.

programme.title: UEL: Aston Villa v Bologna
programme.desc: Aston Villa begin their hunt for the UEFA Europa League trophy as they welcome Vincenzo Italiano's Bologna to Villa Park. Unai Emery's side beat Bologna 2-0 in last year's UCL.

programme.title: UEL: Red Star v Celtic
programme.desc: Brendan Rodgers' Celtic kick-off their UEFA Europa League campaign with a trip to take on Serbian champions Red Star at Rajko Mitic Stadium.

programme.title: UEL: Celtic v Braga
programme.desc: Celtic seek their first win of the league phase as they host Portuguese side Braga at Celtic Park. The visitors are winless in their last five league games.

programme.title: UEL: Nottm Forest v Midtjylland
programme.desc: European football returns to the City Ground as Nottingham Forest face-off against Danish side Midtjylland. Can Ange Postecoglou pick up his first win as Forest boss?

programme.title: UEL: Feyenoord v Aston Villa
programme.desc: Unai Emery's Aston Villa look to make it three wins on the spin in all competitions as they travel to face Robin van Persie's Feyenoord in the UEFA Europa League.

programme.title: UEL: Sturm Graz v Rangers
programme.desc: Rangers travel to face Austrian champions Sturm Graz at Merkur-Arena. Sturm Graz were 2-0 winners when these sides last met in Europe back in 2000.

programme.title: UEL: Go Ahead Eagles v Aston Villa
programme.desc: Aston Villa aim to make it three UEFA Europa League wins out of three as they travel to face Dutch side Go Ahead Eagles at De Adelaarshorst.

programme.title: UEL: Brann v Rangers
programme.desc: Danny Rohl begins life at Rangers with a trip to face Norwegian side SK Brann at Brann Stadion. Can the Gers get off the mark in the UEFA Europa League?

programme.title: UEL: Celtic v Sturm Graz
programme.desc: Action from the UEFA Europa League as Celtic seek their first win of the league phase against Austrian champions Sturm Graz at Merkur Arena.

programme.title: UEL: Nottingham Forest v Porto
programme.desc: Sean Dyche takes charge of Nottingham Forest as they seek their first win of the UEFA Europa League campaign against Portuguese giants Porto at the City Ground.

programme.title: UEL: Midtjylland v Celtic
programme.desc: Action from the UEFA Europa League as Celtic travel to the MCH Arena to face a Midtjylland side that have made a perfect start to their league phase campaign.

programme.title: UEL: Sturm Graz v Nottm Forest
programme.desc: Sean Dyche's Nottingham Forest seek consecutive UEFA Europa League wins as they travel to face Austrian side Sturm Graz at Liebenauer Stadium.

programme.title: UEL: Aston Villa v Maccabi
programme.desc: Unai Emery's Aston Villa look to climb the league phase table as they host winless Maccabi Tel Aviv at Villa Park.

programme.title: UEL: Rangers v Roma
programme.desc: Danny Rohl seeks his first UEFA Europa League win in charge of Rangers as they host Gian Piero Gasperini's Roma at Ibrox Stadium.

programme.title: UEL: Aston Villa v Young Boys
programme.desc: Unai Emery's Aston Villa hunt for consecutive UEFA Europa League wins as they go head-to-head with Swiss side Young Boys at Villa Park.

programme.title: MLB Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from Major League Baseball including Seattle Mariners facing off against San Diego Padres, and New York Mets up against New York Yankees. (17.05)

programme.title: Ninja A-League Grand Final 2026
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Ninja A-League Women Grand Final between four-time winners Melbourne City and first-time finalists Wellington Phoenix at AAMI Park.

programme.title: Giro d'Italia Men Highlights - S9
programme.desc: Highlights from stage nine of Giro d'Italia 2026, which sees the peloton take on a 184km hilly route from the seaside town of Cervia up to the ski resort of Corno alle Scale.

programme.title: Isuzu FA Vase Final 2026
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Isuzu FA Vase final as non-league sides AFC Stoneham and Cockfosters lock horns at Wembley Stadium.

programme.title: Isuzu FA Trophy Final 2026
programme.desc: Action from the 2026 Isuzu FA Trophy final at Wembley Stadium as National League sides Southend United and Wealdstone go head-to-head.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour
programme.desc: Action from the fifth round of the 2026 Global Champions Tour, taking place at Club de Campo in Madrid, Spain.

programme.title: AFL: Brisbane Lions v Geelong
programme.desc: Action from the Gabba as Brisbane Lions take on Geelong Cats in a repeat of last season's Grand Final, which the Lions won 122-75.

programme.title: AFL: Sydney Swans v Collingwood
programme.desc: Action from the Australian Football League as Sydney Swans meet Collingwood at the SCG. Can the table-topping Swans collect a seventh win on the spin?
